spec.objective: Phase 1 orchestration smoke: Claude delegates FramedBlocks batch-01 mixin baseline verification (children 03 and 05) to Grok
constraints: Two-child subset of batch 01 for ~2–3 minute runtime
Grok executes identity patches only through the validation gate

acceptance_criteria: Both child tasks created with parent_id linking to this task
Orchestrate run completes with all identity children accepted
Gradle compileJava succeeds in each workload worktree
